## Describe the Bug
A clear description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behavior
What you expected to happen.

## Screenshots
If applicable, add screenshots.

## Environment
- OS: [e.g. macOS 14, Windows 11]
- Browser: [e.g. Chrome 122, Firefox 124]
- Node.js version: [e.g. 20.11]
